About This Group
Bogonko-Ngelani Stage — Official Boda Boda Welfare Group, Katani, Pridelands. Est. & registered with county authorities.
How to Pay via M-Pesa
1. M-Pesa → Lipa na M-Pesa → Pay Bill
2. Business No: 544600
3. Account No: 942540
